sentences.text: In my opinion, formal written examinations are a valid way to assess students' learning.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 在我看来，正式笔试是评估学生学习情况的一种有效方式。

sentences.text: In my opinion, formal written examinations are not the best way to assess students' learning.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 在我看来，正式笔试不是评估学生学习情况的最好方式。

sentences.text: In my opinion, formal written examinations are useful, but they should not be the only method.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 在我看来，正式笔试是有用的，但它不应该是唯一的方法。

sentences.text: In my opinion, travel is a necessary part of a quality education.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 在我看来，旅行是高质量教育中必要的一部分。

sentences.text: In my opinion, travel is not a necessary part of a quality education.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 在我看来，旅行不是高质量教育中必要的一部分。

sentences.text: In my opinion, travel is helpful for education, but it is not necessary.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 在我看来，旅行对教育有帮助，但不是必须的。

sentences.text: In my opinion, studying old plays has more benefits than problems for high school students.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 在我看来，对高中生来说，学习古老戏剧的好处多于问题。

sentences.text: I believe studying plays written centuries ago is useful, but it can also be difficult for students.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 我认为学习几个世纪前写的戏剧是有用的，但它对学生来说也可能很难。

sentences.text: In my opinion, old plays are valuable if teachers explain them in a clear way.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 在我看来，如果老师讲解得清楚，古老戏剧是很有价值的。

sentences.text: In my opinion, experiential learning is very beneficial in high school and college.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 在我看来，体验式学习在高中和大学非常有益。

sentences.text: I believe experiential learning is useful, but traditional teaching is also important.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 我认为体验式学习很有用，但传统教学也很重要。

sentences.text: In my opinion, experiential learning should be used more in schools and colleges.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 在我看来，学校和大学应该更多地使用体验式学习。

sentences.text: In my opinion, universities can deduct marks for late assignments, but the policy should be fair.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 在我看来，大学可以对迟交作业扣分，但这个政策应该公平。

sentences.text: I believe deducting marks for late work is useful, but it should not be too strict.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 我认为迟交扣分是有用的，但不应该太严格。

sentences.text: In my opinion, universities should deduct marks only when students are late without a good reason.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 在我看来，大学只应该在学生无正当理由迟交时扣分。

sentences.text: In my opinion, it is realistic for students to combine study and work at the same time.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 在我看来，学生同时兼顾学习和工作是现实的。

sentences.text: I believe study and work can be combined, but students need to keep a good balance.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 我认为学习和工作可以同时进行，但学生需要保持良好的平衡。

sentences.text: In my opinion, combining study and employment is possible in modern life, but it depends on the situation.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 在我看来，在现代生活中同时兼顾学习和工作是可能的，但这取决于具体情况。

sentences.text: In my opinion, life experience is a very effective teacher.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 在我看来，生活经验是一位非常有效的老师。

sentences.text: I agree that experience can teach people more deeply than books in some cases.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 我同意，在某些情况下，经验比书本更能让人学得深刻。

sentences.text: In my opinion, experience is important, but books and school education are also necessary.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 在我看来，经验很重要，但书本和学校教育也同样是必要的。

sentences.text: In my opinion, digital media has many advantages, but libraries are still important.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 在我看来，数字媒体有很多优点，但图书馆仍然很重要。

sentences.text: I believe universities should not depend only on digital media.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 我认为大学不应该只依赖数字资料。

sentences.text: In my opinion, universities should use both digital media and traditional library resources.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 在我看来，大学应该同时使用数字资料和传统图书馆资源。

sentences.text: In my opinion, schools should make learning a foreign language compulsory.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 在我看来，学校应该把外语设为必修课。

sentences.text: I believe foreign language learning is important because it broadens students' minds.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 我认为学习外语很重要，因为它可以开阔学生的眼界。

sentences.text: In my opinion, foreign languages should be compulsory, but schools should teach them in an interesting way.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 在我看来，外语应该是必修课，但学校应该用有趣的方式来教。

sentences.text: In my opinion, learning a foreign language is still necessary in modern society.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 在我看来，在现代社会学习外语仍然是有必要的。

sentences.text: I believe artificial intelligence is helpful, but it does not make foreign language learning unnecessary.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 我认为人工智能很有帮助，但它并没有让外语学习变得没有必要。

sentences.text: In my opinion, learning a foreign language is less necessary than before, but it is still important.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 在我看来，学习外语比以前没那么必要了，但它仍然很重要。

sentences.text: Schools should teach practical skills because students need them in real life.
sentences.source: legacy_seed_phase1
sentences.translationZh: 学校应该教授实用技能，因为学生在现实生活中需要这些技能。

sentences.text: Traditional study is still useful because it builds strong basic knowledge.
sentences.source: legacy_seed_phase1
sentences.translationZh: 传统学习仍然有用，因为它能打下扎实的基础知识。

sentences.text: A mixed method often works best, with both theory and practice.
sentences.source: legacy_seed_phase1
sentences.translationZh: 理论与实践结合的混合方式通常效果最好。

sentences.text: In my opinion, modern mass communication has both positive and negative effects on individuals and society.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 在我看来，现代大众传播对个人和社会既有积极影响，也有消极影响。

sentences.text: I strongly agree that the information revolution has changed people's lives in both good and bad ways.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 我非常同意，信息革命以好的和坏的两种方式改变了人们的生活。

sentences.text: I believe modern mass communication is useful, but it also brings some serious problems.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 我认为现代大众传播是有用的，但它也带来了一些严重问题。

sentences.text: In my opinion, mass media has a strong influence on society and on people's opinions and character.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 在我看来，大众传媒对社会以及人们的观点和性格有很强的影响。

sentences.text: I agree that mass media plays an important role in shaping people's opinions and character.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 我同意，大众传媒在塑造人们的观点和性格方面起着重要作用。

sentences.text: I strongly believe that mass media has a great impact on modern society.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 我坚信大众传媒对现代社会有很大的影响。

sentences.text: In my opinion, mass media has a great influence on people, especially young people.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 在我看来，大众传媒对人们，尤其是年轻人，有很大的影响。

sentences.text: I strongly agree that mass media plays an important role in shaping people's opinions.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 我非常同意，大众传媒在塑造人们观点方面起着重要作用。

sentences.text: I believe mass media has both positive and negative influences, but its overall effect is very strong.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 我认为大众传媒既有积极影响，也有消极影响，但它的整体影响非常强。

sentences.text: In my opinion, television has many useful functions in daily life.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 在我看来，电视在日常生活中有很多有用的功能。

sentences.text: I largely agree that television is useful because it can relax people and help them learn.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 我大体同意电视是有用的，因为它可以让人放松，也可以帮助人们学习。

sentences.text: I believe television is important, especially for people who feel lonely.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 我认为电视很重要，尤其是对感到孤独的人来说。

sentences.text: In my opinion, it is a blessing rather than a curse.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 在我看来，这更多是一种福祉，而不是诅咒。

sentences.text: I believe increasing life expectancy is a positive development, although it may bring some challenges.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 我认为预期寿命的提高是一种积极的发展，尽管它也会带来一些挑战。

sentences.text: In my opinion, advanced technology is a blessing if it is used in the right way.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 在我看来，如果使用得当，先进技术就是一种福祉。

sentences.text: In my opinion, the smartphone is one of the most important new inventions in modern society.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 在我看来，智能手机是现代社会最重要的新发明之一。

sentences.text: I believe the smartphone has had a mostly positive impact on society.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 我认为智能手机对社会产生了大多是积极的影响。

sentences.text: In my opinion, the smartphone is a useful invention, but it also has some negative effects.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 在我看来，智能手机是一项有用的发明，但它也有一些负面影响。

sentences.text: In my opinion, the computer is the most important invention of the past hundred years.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 在我看来，计算机是过去一百年里最重要的发明。

sentences.text: I believe the computer is the greatest invention because it affects almost every part of modern life.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 我认为计算机是最伟大的发明，因为它影响了现代生活的几乎每一个方面。

sentences.text: In my opinion, the computer is more important than many other inventions.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 在我看来，计算机比许多其他发明更重要。

sentences.text: Technology can save time and make information easy to get.
sentences.source: legacy_seed_phase1
sentences.translationZh: 科技可以节省时间，并让信息更容易获取。

sentences.text: Too much media use can harm focus and healthy communication.
sentences.source: legacy_seed_phase1
sentences.translationZh: 过度使用媒体会损害专注力和健康沟通。

sentences.text: Technology is useful when people use it with clear limits.
sentences.source: legacy_seed_phase1
sentences.translationZh: 当人们有明确边界地使用科技时，它是有益的。

sentences.text: In my opinion, involving employees in decision-making has more advantages than disadvantages.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 在我看来，让员工参与决策利大于弊。

sentences.text: I think this policy is helpful, but it can also create some problems.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 我认为这种政策有帮助，但它也会带来一些问题。

sentences.text: I believe this policy is good if it is used in the right way.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 我认为如果使用得当，这种政策是好的。

sentences.text: In my opinion, companies should place more emphasis on their reputation.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 在我看来，公司应该更重视自己的声誉。

sentences.text: I believe company reputation is more important than short-term strategies.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 我认为公司声誉比短期策略更重要。

sentences.text: In my opinion, short-term strategies are useful, but they should not be the main focus.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 在我看来，短期策略是有用的，但它不应该成为重点。

sentences.text: In my opinion, this is a very common problem in modern society.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 在我看来，这是现代社会中一个非常普遍的问题。

sentences.text: I believe this shortage of personal time can cause serious health and family problems.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 我认为个人时间的短缺会带来严重的健康和家庭问题。

sentences.text: In my opinion, the lack of personal time is widespread, and it can also affect society in a negative way.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 在我看来，个人时间不足的问题很普遍，而且它也会对社会产生负面影响。

sentences.text: In my opinion, keeping a balance between work and personal life is very important.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 在我看来，保持工作和个人生活之间的平衡非常重要。

sentences.text: I believe this balance is important because work is not the only part of life.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 我认为这种平衡很重要，因为工作并不是生活的全部。

sentences.text: In my opinion, work-life balance is very important, but it is difficult to achieve in modern society.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 在我看来，工作与生活的平衡非常重要，但在现代社会中很难实现。

sentences.text: In my opinion, shortening the working week can help reduce unemployment, but it is not a complete solution.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 在我看来，缩短每周工作时间可以帮助减少失业，但它不是一个完整的解决办法。

sentences.text: I believe this idea has both advantages and disadvantages.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 我认为这个想法既有优点，也有缺点。

sentences.text: In my opinion, this policy should apply to the whole workforce rather than only young people.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 在我看来，这项政策应该适用于整个劳动力，而不只是年轻人。

sentences.text: In my opinion, people will work fewer hours in the future.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 在我看来，未来人们会工作更少的时间。

sentences.text: I partly agree that people will work less in the future.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 我部分同意未来人们会工作更少时间。

sentences.text: In my opinion, this change may happen for some workers, but not for everyone.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 在我看来，这种变化可能会发生在一部分劳动者身上，但不会发生在所有人身上。

sentences.text: In my opinion, there should not be a strict maximum wage for high-paying people.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 在我看来，不应该为高收入人群设定严格的最高工资。

sentences.text: I believe there should be some control over very high wages.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 我认为对非常高的工资应该有一定的限制。

sentences.text: In my opinion, high salaries are acceptable, but they should be reasonable.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 在我看来，高薪是可以接受的，但它应该是合理的。

sentences.text: Workers need fair hours so they can stay healthy and productive.
sentences.source: legacy_seed_phase1
sentences.translationZh: 劳动者需要公平的工时，才能保持健康并提高效率。

sentences.text: Some strict rules can reduce company flexibility in hard times.
sentences.source: legacy_seed_phase1
sentences.translationZh: 一些过于严格的规则会在困难时期降低公司的灵活性。

sentences.text: Good policy should protect workers and support business growth.
sentences.source: legacy_seed_phase1
sentences.translationZh: 好的政策应当既保护劳动者，也支持企业发展。

sentences.text: In my opinion, laws can change human behavior to a great extent.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 在我看来，法律在很大程度上可以改变人的行为。

sentences.text: In my opinion, laws have only a limited effect on human behavior.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 在我看来，法律对人的行为只有有限的影响。

sentences.text: In my opinion, laws can change human behavior, but they are not the only factor.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 在我看来，法律可以改变人的行为，但它不是唯一因素。

sentences.text: In my opinion, governments should take the main responsibility for climate change.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 在我看来，政府应该对气候变化承担主要责任。

sentences.text: I believe big companies should take more responsibility for climate change.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 我认为大公司应该对气候变化承担更多责任。

sentences.text: In my opinion, everyone should take responsibility, but governments and big companies should do more.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 在我看来，每个人都应该承担责任，但政府和大公司应该做得更多。

sentences.text: In my opinion, I would choose global warming as my area of study.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 在我看来，我会选择全球变暖作为我的研究方向。

sentences.text: I would prefer to study renewable energy in the field of climate change.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 在气候变化这个领域中，我更想研究可再生能源。

sentences.text: In my opinion, environmental protection is the best area to study.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 在我看来，环境保护是最好的研究方向。

sentences.text: In my opinion, global warming is the most pressing problem in the world today.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 在我看来，全球变暖是当今世界最紧迫的问题。

sentences.text: I believe global warming is the biggest problem for people on our planet.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 我认为全球变暖是地球上人类面临的最大问题。

sentences.text: In my opinion, global warming should be the top concern of governments and organizations.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 在我看来，全球变暖应该成为各国政府和组织最关注的问题。

sentences.text: In my opinion, governments should focus more on improving public transport.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 在我看来，政府应该更重视改善公共交通。

sentences.text: I believe building better public transport is more important than building more roads.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 我认为建设更好的公共交通比修更多道路更重要。

sentences.text: In my opinion, public transport should be the main choice, although roads are still necessary.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 在我看来，公共交通应该成为主要选择，尽管道路仍然是必要的。

sentences.text: Clear laws can guide behavior and protect vulnerable people.
sentences.source: legacy_seed_phase1
sentences.translationZh: 明确的法律可以引导行为并保护弱势群体。

sentences.text: Rules alone are not enough if people do not accept them.
sentences.source: legacy_seed_phase1
sentences.translationZh: 如果人们不认可，单靠规则是不够的。

sentences.text: Law and education should work together for long-term change.
sentences.source: legacy_seed_phase1
sentences.translationZh: 法律与教育应协同作用，才能实现长期改变。

sentences.text: Climate action should start now because delay makes problems worse.
sentences.source: legacy_seed_phase1
sentences.translationZh: 气候行动应该现在开始，因为拖延会让问题更严重。

sentences.text: Short-term costs are high, so policy needs careful planning.
sentences.source: legacy_seed_phase1
sentences.translationZh: 短期成本较高，因此政策需要谨慎规划。

sentences.text: Shared action by governments, companies and people is the best path.
sentences.source: legacy_seed_phase1
sentences.translationZh: 政府、企业和公众的共同行动是最佳路径。

sentences.text: In my opinion, tourism has more advantages than disadvantages for a less developed country.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 在我看来，对于一个欠发达国家来说，旅游业利大于弊。

sentences.text: In my opinion, tourism has both advantages and disadvantages for a less developed country.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 在我看来，对于一个欠发达国家来说，旅游业既有优点也有缺点。

sentences.text: In my opinion, tourism can be good for a less developed country, but it must be controlled carefully.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 在我看来，旅游业对欠发达国家可以是有好处的，但必须被谨慎管理。

sentences.text: In my opinion, it is important to preserve beautiful old buildings, even if it is expensive.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 在我看来，保护美丽的老建筑很重要，即使花费很高。

sentences.text: I believe preserving old buildings is necessary because they have both cultural and practical value.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 我认为保护老建筑是有必要的，因为它们既有文化价值，也有实际价值。

sentences.text: In my opinion, preserving old buildings is important, but the cost should also be considered carefully.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 在我看来，保护老建筑很重要，但成本也应该被认真考虑。

sentences.text: In my opinion, this is not a fully positive development.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 在我看来，这并不是一个完全积极的发展。

sentences.text: I believe replacing small shops with large malls has more disadvantages than advantages.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 我认为用大型商场取代小商店是弊大于利的。

sentences.text: In my opinion, large shopping malls are convenient, but they should not replace all local shops.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 在我看来，大型购物商场很方便，但它们不应该取代所有本地小商店。

sentences.text: In my opinion, building design has a strong influence on people's work and daily life.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 在我看来，建筑设计对人们的工作和日常生活有很大的影响。

sentences.text: I believe good building design brings many positive effects to both homes and workplaces.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 我认为好的建筑设计会给住宅和工作场所带来很多积极影响。

sentences.text: In my opinion, poor building design can cause many problems in people's lives.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 在我看来，不好的建筑设计会给人们的生活带来很多问题。

sentences.text: In my opinion, I prefer city life.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 在我看来，我更喜欢城市生活。

sentences.text: I prefer living in the countryside because it is quieter and more peaceful.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 我更喜欢住在乡村，因为那里更安静、更平和。

sentences.text: In my opinion, city life is better for me at this stage of life.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 在我看来，在我现阶段的人生中，城市生活更适合我。

sentences.text: In my opinion, I do not fully agree with this idea.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 在我看来，我并不完全同意这个观点。

sentences.text: I believe countries should spend money on both old buildings and modern housing.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 我认为各国应该同时把钱花在老建筑和现代住房上。

sentences.text: In my opinion, spending too much money on old buildings instead of housing is not a good idea.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 在我看来，把太多钱花在老建筑上而不是住房上，并不是一个好主意。

sentences.text: Public transport can cut traffic and make cities more livable.
sentences.source: legacy_seed_phase1
sentences.translationZh: 公共交通可以缓解拥堵，让城市更宜居。

sentences.text: Rapid city changes can hurt local culture and small businesses.
sentences.source: legacy_seed_phase1
sentences.translationZh: 城市的快速变化可能伤害本地文化和小商户。

sentences.text: Cities need modern development and protection of key heritage.
sentences.source: legacy_seed_phase1
sentences.translationZh: 城市既需要现代化发展，也需要保护关键文化遗产。

sentences.text: In my opinion, parents should be legally responsible for some actions of their children.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 在我看来，父母应该为孩子的某些行为承担法律责任。

sentences.text: I believe parents should not be legally responsible for every action of their children.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 我认为父母不应该为孩子的每一个行为都承担法律责任。

sentences.text: In my opinion, parents should share some responsibility, but children should also be responsible for their own actions.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 在我看来，父母应该承担一部分责任，但孩子也应该为自己的行为负责。

sentences.text: In my opinion, famous entertainers and sportspeople should not give up their right to privacy.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 在我看来，著名艺人和运动员不应该放弃他们的隐私权。

sentences.text: I disagree with the idea that privacy is the price of fame.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 我不同意“隐私是成名代价”这个观点。

sentences.text: In my opinion, famous people should accept some public attention, but they should still keep basic privacy.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 在我看来，名人应该接受一定的公众关注，但他们仍然应该保有基本隐私。

sentences.text: In my opinion, the minimum age for driving should be 18.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 在我看来，开车的最低年龄应该是 18 岁。

sentences.text: I believe people should not drive until they are 18 years old.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 我认为人们应该到 18 岁以后再开车。

sentences.text: In my opinion, 18 is the right age for driving.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 在我看来，18 岁是适合开车的年龄。

sentences.text: In my opinion, it is harder for children to grow up in the 21st century than in the past.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 在我看来，孩子们在21世纪成长比过去更难。

sentences.text: I agree that modern life has made childhood more difficult in many ways.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 我同意现代生活在很多方面让童年变得更困难。

sentences.text: In my opinion, children's lives today are better in some ways, but growing up is still harder overall.
sentences.source: docx_观点句分类整理_通用万能句+场景版
sentences.translationZh: 在我看来，虽然今天孩子们的生活在一些方面更好了，但总体来说成长还是更难。
